subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! Leave me not disappointed of what is with Thee, and drive me not from Thy gate which Thou hast opened before the faces of those who are therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی لا تخیبنی عما عندک و لاتطردنی عن بابک الذی فتحته علی وجوه من فی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
